timeline: Magnet ring completion: Summer 2026. First plasma (SPARC): 2027. Net power demo (Q>1): 2027. Commercial plant (ARC) at James River, VA: Early 2030s.
dc_connection: Google signed first-of-kind corporate fusion PPA (July 2025)
funding: $2B+ raised. Backed by Google, Bill Gates, Tiger Global

technology: Field-reversed configuration (FRC) - pulsed fusion for direct electricity
timeline: Polaris prototype: 150M C achieved (Feb 2026) - 75% of target. Orion (commercial reactor): Under construction. Microsoft PPA: Electricity delivery targeted 2028.
dc_connection: Direct contract with Microsoft to supply fusion electricity starting 2028
funding: $577M+ raised. Backed by Sam Altman (OpenAI), $500M from Sam Altman personally
